name: Subagents
description: Spinning up scoped sub-agents that each own one job, then composing their output.

name: Prompt engineering
description: Shaping prompts, personas, and instructions to steer model behavior reliably.

name: Context management
description: Managing what the model can see — context windows, working directories, freshness.

name: Skills
description: Packaging a repeatable capability as a reusable skill the agent can invoke.

name: Hooks
description: Triggering agent work automatically on an event — a commit, a schedule, a message.

name: MCP & tools
description: Connecting agents to external systems and data through tools and MCP servers.

name: Evals
description: Measuring quality with checks and graders before a change is allowed to ship.

name: Multi-agent
description: Coordinating several agents toward one outcome with clear, legible handoffs.

name: Structured output
description: Forcing legible, schema-shaped output instead of free text, so results are checkable.

name: Retrieval
description: Finding and grounding on the right source material on demand, with traceability.
